content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch encode() and possibly encode_ordinary()/encode ... let me know what file/functions you're touching to avoid clobbering.

agent2: I've added a 'transformers' param to Encoding.encode() only (not encode_ordinary) in tiktoken/core.py - it's the first param added after '*' in the signature, and I apply transformers to text right at the top of the function body before the allowed_special/disallowed_special logic. I did not touch encode_ordinary(). Should be a clean merge with your return_positions param as long as we place our params/logic in different spots - let me know if you need me to adjust ordering.
